findings.description: The navigation section (s1) hints are missing several major topic categories that appear in the source TOC: executeQuery（カーソル検索）, insert_update_delete（追加・更新・削除）, object-select-label（オブジェクト検索）, and map-search-label（マップ検索）. These are substantive areas a user might search for to locate this TOC section.
findings.source_evidence: Source TOC lists: :ref:`executeQuery-label`, :ref:`insert_update_delete`, :ref:`object-select-label`, :ref:`map-search-label` — none of which appear in s1 hints.
